socrates.thinking: Autotune at 52.1% with 2 trials done. Best score is 0.602200, which is below 0.62. This is concerning - the autotune with the 100M model size constraint is finding lower accuracy than before (when we had 0.64 on the subset). The size constraint might be too aggressive. Let me wait and see if more trials improve, but I may need to adjust the approach - perhaps use a larger autotuneModelSize (since we can quantize later) or remove the size constraint entirely during autotune.
